message:
feat: add top-level frankenpandas facade crate with unified public API (frankenpandas-nsf)

Add a 'frankenpandas' crate that re-exports the entire public API
through a single dependency, enabling clean imports:

```rust
use frankenpandas::prelude::*;

let df = read_csv_str("name,age\nAlice,30\nBob,25").unwrap();
let filtered = df.query("age > 28").unwrap();
```

Re-exports organized by category:
- Core types: DataFrame, Series, Index, MultiIndex, Scalar, DType, Column
- Module functions: concat, to_datetime, to_timedelta, to_numeric, cut, qcut
- IO (7 formats): CSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Excel, Feather, SQL
- Traits: DataFrameExprExt (eval/query), DataFrameMergeExt, DataFrameIoExt
- Runtime: RuntimePolicy, EvidenceLedger

Prelude module provides the most commonly needed subset.
5 smoke tests verify prelude functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
